title: Move GST Services section to last position with minimal content

requirements.text: Reorder the sections in App.tsx so that the GSTServicesSection appears last among the brand sections, after AssuredToursSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, and ComingSoonSection.
acceptanceCriteria: GSTServicesSection renders after all other brand and coming-soon sections in the page layout.
All other sections remain in their existing order above GST Services.

requirements.text: Reduce the content in GSTServicesSection.tsx to a brief, minimal presentation: keep the section header and a short one-line description of GST services, but trim service cards down to 3 cards maximum with concise one-line labels and no detailed descriptions.

quotes: don't mention much details as I don't know much but yeah give some part

acceptanceCriteria: GST Services section displays no more than 3 service cards.
Each card has only a short label — no lengthy descriptions or bullet points.
A brief introductory sentence about GST services is present under the section header.
The section still matches the gold/obsidian luxury theme of the rest of the site.

constraints: Do not remove the GST Services section entirely — it must still be present and visible.
Do not alter the order or content of any other brand sections.
nonGoals: Adding new GST service details or expanding GST content.
Changing the visual theme or layout style of any other section.
